Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. x****r Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondents No.4 to 7, which is taken on record; whereas, Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the issue regarding early retirement being sought by the Petitioner in view of the policy as prevailin& has already been directed to be decided by the departrnent in C.P.No.D-1232 of 2021 vide Order dated, 07.09.202L and similar order be passed in this matter. No one objects. Accordingly in view of above, this Petition is disposed of with direction to the Respondents No.4&5 to decide the request of the Petitioner preferably within a period of thirty (30-days] from today in accordance with the prevailing law and circular of the Finance Departmen! as noted above.
